reviews.review_description: I didn't really enjoy playing sandbox games before because I thought I could do anything, but it also took a lot of patience and time to accomplish something. In this, quests are given following humorous scenarios. For each quest, the way to achieve the goal is to be done freely as Sandbox game, but it's fun to achieve the quest goals one by one while feeling like becoming a god.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review!! We tried to sprinkle in as much fun and humor as possible, so it's great to hear that you're enjoying it 😊

reviews.review_title: A nice tribute to Black & White
reviews.review_description: The game is very heavily inspired by classic god games and really brings the genre to vr very. The devs have made a love letter to those old classics. :)

developer_response.body: Thank you very much, that means a lot to us 🥹

reviews.review_description:
I was a bit reluctant to buy this game. I thought the devs were going to tell us it's a bit like B&W to get us onboard and then just do a complete 180, and it will be nothing like B&W. 

However, I was wrong. This game is the closest game to black and white that we have in VR and even elsewhere. I have tried Deisim, godus, and other titles that were meant to be influenced by B&W, and nothing compares to this game.

This is B&W standalone edition in VR. It has the creature, the Army's, the town building, the miracles, the prayers, the side quests, the bosses etc etc it's all in there!

My only complaints really is that I would have liked the prayers to be more animated and desperate like they were in B&W. The prayers just seem a bit monotone in this game, and all prayers sound the same. On that note, I would have liked Good and Evil to be more distinct voice wise. I mean, it kinda works already, but it's not like B&W 😜  and the game is a bit short.

That said though the game is the closest game we are probably ever going to get to black and white in VR. However, it is the standalone and mobile version of black and white VR, so don't expect the same maps size as the original games and the same details. The graphics are simpler, and the worlds aren't nearly as big. But as a long black and white fan, I can say it's scratched the itch of a black and whitegame for sure.

developer_response.body: Hi Jakeyjoe - so happy to hear that How to God lived up to, and exceeded, your expectations. Your feedback is totally valid and thank you for sharing it with us! Since How to God is still in Early Access, we are able to make changes based on our player's feedback. In this case, I'll send your remarks over to the team and see if we can spice up some interactions. We have a lot more planned for this coming year, including some things I think you'll really enjoy. Thanks for picking up How to God and giving us a chance! We really appreciate your review.

reviews.review_description: Super fun to see a strategy god game in a toonier art style! Interacting with the world really makes you feel like a god it's so different from the usual PC titles. I didn't expect the creature raising to actually include teaching it skills like a pet, super fun! Can't wait to shape my world :D

developer_response.body: Hi Kreszenz! Thank you so much for your kind words - we also love the art style and so glad you agree!! Can't wait to see what kind of adventures you have with your creature! Appreciate your review 🥰

reviews.review_description:
I didn't expect such a polished game and so much content from an early access title. The alchemy combined with the village management really makes you feel like a god. And I love the art style — throwing those cute little villagers around feels almost too cruel (almost).
Looking forward to the next updates🎉

developer_response.body: The "almost" is the most important part 🤣 Poor guys. Thank you for the kind words! We worked hard to make sure the game launched in the best form possible. Enjoy, and thanks again for writing a review!!

reviews.review_description: if you want a sandbox game go to a different game this is not very sandbox and more quest like
If you rate you get smith free

developer_response.body: Hope you enjoy! If there's anything we can do to raise your review to 5 stars, we'd love to hear it.

reviews.review_description: This was definitely worth the money. There's so much you can do! id rate it a 8.5/10

developer_response.body: So happy to hear that you're having fun in How to God! If there's anything we can do to make it 10/10 please let us know - you can email us at support@thoughtfish.de or let us know in our Discord (https://discord.gg/Bd7RPrAH9D). Thanks again for your review!

reviews.review_description: I waited so long for this game and now I can finally play it! It even exceeded my expectations. I love interacting with villagers and throwing them around.. actually I committed to play it as an evil God and I'm so excited what it will bring. But also the opportunity to play it again after as a good god is just amazing! My favourite place till now is scottland.. will see what else will come. :D

developer_response.body: Scotland is definitely one of our favorites too!! We're so glad to finally share How to God with the world and are even more glad to hear that you're having such a nice time with it! Thank you so much for your review 🙌 it means a lot to us

reviews.review_description: I’m convinced a portion of these reviews are bots. The game is ok  but 30 bucks is steep imo. I just don’t see the hype from other reviews it just felt ok to me nothing special nothing horrible. I hate Metas review scale 4 stars is to much but 3 is to low. I’d give it a 3.5

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thanks for your feedback 😊 How to God is in active development, so we'd love to make changes that would improve the game for you. If you have any specific feedback that you feel would raise your review, we'd genuinely love to hear it. You can make a ticket in our Discord (https://www.discord.gg/az7bCEF8NF) or send us an email (support@thoughtfish.de). There's lots of development time still available for things to be updated and features to be added, so anything you think would be an improvement is something we want to hear. Thanks again for your feedback 🙂
Thank you for your review ❤️

reviews.review_title: Good game with lots of potential!
reviews.review_description: I have played it in the beta already and it was a ton of fun. I am really excited to continue playing the early access! It already feels much more polished and the new creatures are adorable! I love being able to shape my creature and finding new elements/objects with alchemy :)

developer_response.body: The new creatures are such a highlight for us! The owl and lizard are so incredibly cool!! So glad to hear that you're enjoying your time in How to God and that we've improved since our Beta! Thanks for your review, we appreciate it! 😊

reviews.review_description: would rekomend

I have been looking for a god-like game that reminds me of the days of playing Lionhead Studios Black & White and this feels pretty spot on. It is still early access and they have a road map to work on some of the things that are a bit off, like the AI voices. But, you have a creature, you are the god, you make good or evil choices and make your way through different civilizations. There are quests, discovery steps to finding all the alchemy combinations, resource gathering, building your town up, burning your victims, toss in a little rain and lightning or just throw them off the map. The only thing that sucks is that you can get through everything fairly quickly. However, you can try a different creature, try different tactics and see how some things turn out slightly different. There are some minor early access style issues that they are working on that you can talk about on their Discord server. But, I still really enjoyed playing through it as it is and can’t wait till more is added.

developer_response.body: Hi there thank you so much! We have a bunch of plans coming at you down the road. Next year will be an interesting one for sure 🙌 We appreciate your time and feedback, especially in Discord. Every bit helps, and we are always happy to hear what kind of things you'd like us to implement in the future. Thank you very much for your support!

reviews.review_description:
Okay so How to God is actually awesome. You literally get to be a GOD and everyone listens to you, which is already cool, but there’s so much stuff to do I didn’t expect. You can boss your followers around, mix weird alchemy stuff, and go on quests that get kinda crazy sometimes.

My favorite part is the creature you get to spawn. Mine started off looking kinda goofy but after I trained it (and yelled at it a few times) it became super strong. It feels like having a giant pet that also smashes things for you, which is amazing.

The game basically lets you decide if you wanna be nice or evil and it doesn’t tell you “no” ever. I made some… interesting choices and the game was just like “yeah okay.” 😂

Anyway if you like messing around in a world and having a big creature buddy, this game is seriously worth playing. I can’t stop.

developer_response.body: Nothing better than watching your creature eat a villager for the first time 🤣 Thank you so much for your review, so glad to hear how much fun you're having!!

reviews.review_description: bh

I‘ve been anticipating the release of How to God for quite some time and now I can finally play it myself!
From the day I saw the first teaser and gameplay footages I wanted to throw around villagers myself and explore what this game has to offer. 
And I gotta say, you do feel a bit like a god in this game, it’s just so much fun to tinker around and see the world developing under your control. 
Really excited to explore more and see what’s coming next.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We're really proud of the work our team was able to put into the game - and we have a lot more coming 😊 We can't wait to share it with you. Thanks for your review!

reviews.review_description:
How to god captures the spirit of games like black and white and brings it to virtual reality!
You are a "god" and have to solve task for and with your villagers and your godly pet. 

The game mostly runs really well and is fun to play, but still has a few quirks and issues. 

-The resolution needs to be higher, it can be very pixelated. 
-In German text the Umlaute are missing (ä, ö, ü). 
-I would suggest only highlighting the water around the hand and not the whole ocean, which can look a little weird, when you are just resting your hand.
-The teleporting perk of the pet should not be used for short distances, since it seems to take longer than just walking.

developer_response.body: Hi Janred! Thanks for your feedback, it's very much appreciated. I've sent your points over to our development team. For the resolution, there should be an updated version on QuestGamesOptimizer if you're interested in playing in a higher quality. For the water highlight, this is something we've raised in the past, but we've added it back to our list to see if there's anything additional we can do here to make it look more appealing. Thanks a bunch for playing How to God - we have more updates coming soon so keep an eye out!

reviews.review_description: For anyone who's played Fable or Populus, this is a game very much in that vein. Build up your little world, convert followers and just explore. It's all very cute and quite relaxing. I think my only wish would be that it were playable with hand tracking, but it works well with controllers as is.

developer_response.body: Thanks, Cim! Noted on the hand tracking, I sent your request over to the team and I think it would be a really fun addition. You never know what the future holds! Thanks for your suggestion and appreciate you taking the time to review.

reviews.review_description:
A wonderful game for venting everyday frustrations on innocent villagers, throwing fireballs around, and then, once you've calmed down, extinguishing the blazing fires and helping with the reconstruction.
I recommend it.

developer_response.body: Nothing better than getting to throw a villager or two into the sky 😅 So glad to have your recommendation, and best of luck to all of your future villagers 🤣 Thank you so much for your review.

reviews.review_description: Just like what black & white could have been

developer_response.body: We tried our best to capture the familiar feeling of being a god from games like Black and White - glad you're enjoying it! We really appreciate your review 😊

reviews.review_description: I really like how you get to be a god of your own making

developer_response.body: Exactly! Glad you're liking How to God, thanks for your review 😊

reviews.review_description: I really like how much freedom the player gets, from choosing the creature, the elements and how you go about the whole thing. Super well made! (p.s I want the owl as a plushie, its adorable)

developer_response.body: Owl plushie, you say?? We might have to add that to our list... But so happy to hear that you're having a good time in How to God! Choosing the creature is one of the best parts too. Enjoy 🦉

reviews.review_description: In its genre, How to God is a very good god game. You can access to many scenarios, there are tons of possibilities, and the action rapidly becomes hectic! So many things to deal with, at the same time... Honestly, if you like sims and god games alike, HtG worthes a good try!

developer_response.body: Hi thank you so much for your review!! There's even more to come as we update How to God in these next few months 😊 Hope you enjoy!

reviews.review_title: VR:2G, whereas, im not even a little "g"
reviews.review_description:
This game, has, Every aspect of VR, you could find, enjoyable.

Even, including, but not limited too, FetchQuests, Awesome "deitified" powers, morality index.

Now, i just need ny Boss, too check this out...

DougleBot aka Douglas Weiss, Founder 

Enjoy. -E-F-

developer_response.body: Well, be sure to send your boss our way, we have key giveaways every so often in our Discord! We're pleased to hear that you're enjoying How to God - and we're just getting started. We're always open to hear any feedback you have! Thanks again for your review, we really appreciate it 😊

reviews.review_description: Really good game

developer_response.body: Hi Smallz! Glad you think so 😇 If there's anything you think is missing from the game or anything we can do to improve your review, please let us know! We're still actively updating the game every few weeks and would love to hear any and all feedback. Feel free to join our Discord or email us at support@thoughtfish.de

reviews.review_description: It's a very good ge I love throwing fire balls at people but I don't know how to make shrines and I can't look it up bc the game is so new so if the devs or anyone else can tell me how to make them I'll change the review to 5 stars

developer_response.body: Hi there! Good question - a shrine can be built with 8 blocks. You make a 3x3 square, but remove the block in the center so it's a bit of a square donut 😅 Hopefully that makes sense! If you need any additional help, please let me know!

reviews.review_description: Amazing and hard to get bored of

developer_response.body: We really appreciate that!! 😇 Very happy to hear that you're enjoying How to God - keep an eye out for even more fun coming at you next week.

reviews.review_title: A FRESH AND IMMERSIVE GOD-SIM IN VR ⭐⭐⭐⭐
reviews.review_description:
How to God delivers a refreshing take on the classic god-game formula, brought to life beautifully in VR. 
The sense of presence is fantastic: shaping villages, helping followers, casting miracles, and interacting directly with the world all feel natural and tactile. 
The blend of creativity, exploration, and light strategy makes every session unique and genuinely fun. 
The environments are charming, the progression is motivating, and the divine abilities are satisfying to use. 
It’s a game with heart, ambition, and a clear passion behind it, and it already shines in Early Access. 
I’m excited to see how the world grows from here!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review, your kind words are so appreciated!! The team worked hard to make How to God as fun as possible, and we're so glad to hear that you're enjoying your time. We really appreciate your review, thank you very much!

reviews.review_title: Best VR game in 2025Best VR game in 2025
reviews.review_description: I love everything about this game your creature, the way you explore different islands the building different blueprints and houses and farms. There’s so much to do so much to play so much to build. I can play for hours and never get bored. I really love the alchemy combining different elements to make a brand new one. I love everything about this game. I will never get bored the best game ever. ￼

developer_response.body: We're honored 😍 Thank you so much for your kind words, we really appreciate it!! We have a lot more stuff coming in the new year, so keep an eye out. And thank you again for your review 😊

reviews.review_title: A Divine Adventure I can’t put down :D
reviews.review_description:
I will 100% spend a ton of time in these godly realms. I already made it past Scotland and can't wait for what secrets the next place holds :D. There are also so many things to discover, so many elements, so many villager jobs, and I haven't even gotten to the creature and its quirks. 
Definitely give this one a go if you love god sims ^^
Very fun game my controller was broken and I thought it was the game

developer_response.body: Oh! Well, glad to hear that there's not a problem with the game, but sorry to hear about your controller 😅 Hope you're able to enjoy the rest of the game regardless 😊 thank you very much for taking the time to leave us a great review

reviews.review_description: Brings back fond memories of Black & White. Fun to flex your good or evil desires upon your followers.

developer_response.body: Thanks, Boogie! Glad to hear you enjoyed your time in How to God. If there's anything you think we can add to the game to make it a more fun or enjoyable experience, please let us know 😊

reviews.review_description: add multiplayer and it is perfect

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! I'll be sure to send your request over to the team 👀 Maybe multiplayer is something we can look into for the future! Appreciate the feedback and idea 😄

reviews.review_description: It's a fun game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review - hope you enjoy your reward 😇 If there's anything we can do to make How to God worthy of 5 stars please let us know! You can send your feedback to us on Discord or via email at support@thoughtfish.de 😊

reviews.review_description: Hegj
Black&White - with a rewardingly balanced but steep learning curve, a quirky creature and super cute immersive design = tons of fun in VR 💜👹😎

developer_response.body: Thank you XaosPrincess! The creature is one of the best parts of a god sim, so we had to keep it in there!! So glad to hear that you're enjoying in the delightful chaos of How to God 😂 And thank you again for your review!

reviews.review_description: It's been a blast tossing mortals around and designing my villages, the game's VR mechanics and controls are genius!

developer_response.body: Hi there thanks so much! Getting to place the buildings however you want is definitely a nice way to unwind 🙏 We're glad that you're enjoying the mechanics and thank you very much for your kind review.

reviews.review_title: Absolute peak of a God simulator
reviews.review_description: I've tried many games like this but none gave me such a reaction. Everything about this game is amazing. From the gameplay to the graphic design.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much!! We worked hard to make How to God as enjoyable as possible, so very happy to hear that you're enjoying it. Thanks for your review!

reviews.review_description: Been waiting for this to come out since the beta! Love what youve done with the place!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much Nugz!! We know how hyped you've been for this one, so we're extremely glad that you're able to start playing! Hope you enjoy 🎉😊

reviews.review_description: this game is good takes me back to black and white god game

developer_response.body: Hi Link, thanks for your review! Black and White was one of our inspirations when making How to God, we're glad to hear that you're having a great time. Thanks so much for your kind words, we appreciate it.

reviews.review_description: i got these game for Christmas and love the alchemy part of the game 10/10

developer_response.body: Alchemy is definitely one of the most fun aspects in How to God, agreed!! Thanks for your review 😊

reviews.review_description: Pls help stuck on the riddle...my belly is full I want for nothing my home is built ..on Scotland level.... otherwise love the game

developer_response.body: Hi Smithy! You'll need a happy villager to solve this riddle 😉 Hopefully that is enough for you to update your review 🙏 If you need any additional help, please reach out in our Discord! There are usually people there willing to help: https://discord.gg/Bd7RPrAH9D

reviews.review_description: Perfect god simulator. Idea to make alchemy I. This type of a game it’s a win win :)

developer_response.body: ~ Visions of alchemy dance in your head ~ 🤣 Thanks so much for your review 😊

reviews.review_description: amazing

developer_response.body: Glad to hear it!! Thank you so much for your review 😊

reviews.review_description: Rated for reward

developer_response.body: Well, we appreciate the honesty, Bob.

reviews.review_description: fun game and reminds me a lot of black and white

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your review! Black and White was definitely one of our inspirations. 😊

reviews.review_description: Love sending my creature on errands and tossing villagers around!! 10/10

developer_response.body: Amazing, super happy to hear that. Thanks so much for your review 😊🫶

reviews.review_description: just bought this this morning and enjoying it thoroughly! i like how it reminds me of black and white. i'm excited to see where this game goes as it's only in early access right now  💜

developer_response.body: Yay!! So glad you're liking it. We have a lot of space to grow into with our early access, so we're excited to show you more! Plus, we're super open to feedback, so feel free to join our Discord and let us know what changes you'd like to see - we might be able to implement them 😇

reviews.review_description: This is a fun god sim game that lets you create and manipulate the world around you almost literally with your own hands. You can decide if you want to be a "good" or an "evil" god (my favorite choice so far), or anything in-between. Graphics or sound all good, no issues. Strong recommendation!

developer_response.body: Evil is unfortunately veryyy fun. We're glad to hear that everything went smoothly so far! Hope you have a blast throwing your adversaries into the sky - and thank you so much for your review!

reviews.review_description: It's so incredibly captivating and heartwarming. I've already spent countless hours playing the beta and can't wait to discover the new continents. Be sure to play it with someone watching – it's so incredibly funny!

developer_response.body: Throwing villagers into the sky is way funnier with friends, that's true!! So glad to hear you're enjoying How to God, and thank you so much for your review 🤩

reviews.review_title: So far so go(o)d. Highly recommend it!
reviews.review_description:
I was following this game for some time and I can say so far I am quite happy with the couple of hours that I put in so far. I chuckle everytime I can throw one of the bandits over the whole map. XD
Looking forward to play more of it in the coming days.

developer_response.body: Throwing the bandits across the map is one of the few joys in life 🤣 We're so glad to hear you're enjoying your time in How to God, and can't wait to see what kind of mayhem you get up to!

reviews.review_description: Loving it. Very well polished and looking forward to further updates

developer_response.body: Very well said! Thank you so much for your kind review. Glad to hear you're having fun in How to God - we have more updates coming every few weeks, so keep an eye out!

reviews.review_description: Loved the god element, loved the alchemy, loved the black & white inspiration, highly recommend to everyone

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review, FriendlyWalrus! So happy to hear that you're enjoying many of the awesome aspects of How to God. Hope you continue to enjoy!

reviews.review_description: Goodl

developer_response.body: Thanks!!

So glad to hear you're enjoying the game - if you run in to any issues, please feel free to reach out to us by email (support@thoughtfish.de) or our Discord channel (https://www.discord.gg/az7bCEF8NF). Thank you for your review 🙌

reviews.review_description: I love it!

developer_response.body: Really glad to hear that, Cosmo!! We really appreciate it - can't wait to show you what fun stuff we have in store (coming super soon!)

reviews.review_description: The wait was worth it! I am absolutely thrilled – a nostalgic feel-good factor with lots of humour and attention to detail. I can't wait to continue playing around with the Alchemy Tool 🤩❤️

developer_response.body: Combining things in alchemy is so satisfying!! Have you discovered all of the combinations yet 👀 Thank you so much for your review, hope you enjoy your time in How to God. 😇

reviews.review_description: I love the quirky and colorful visuals of this game! Especially the creature, when it tries to eat a stone xD It's also really fun to experiment around with the alchemy elements ^^ I look forward to playing this more!

developer_response.body: Eating stones and sometimes villagers - it's hard work, but someone has to do it 😮‍💨 Hope you're having a blast with all of the alchemy aspects!! And thank you so much for your kind review 😇

reviews.review_description: Have just played it for a little bit, but it's been fun so far. Looking frward to see what else the creature can do. Like the graphics, no lags so far.

developer_response.body: The creature is definitely one of the most fun aspects of the game!! So glad you're enjoying your time in How to God so far, and thank you so much for your review! 🙌

reviews.review_description: I just wanted the gift but good

developer_response.body: Thanks Laughing Armadillo! We're always looking to improve, so if there's anything we can do to raise your enjoyment of How to God, we'd love to hear it. You can email us at support@thoughtfish.de or join our Discord and send us feedback directly! https://discord.gg/Bd7RPrAH9D

reviews.review_title: A game where the time flies.
reviews.review_description:
This is most memorable VR experience I had in long while. The time just flew past me by trying new things and having fun. 
While it took me a moment, once I understood the controls, it really felt intuitive and I didn't had to think twice. 
Looking forward to continue playing...

developer_response.body: Hi Nold, thanks so much for your review. So happy to hear that you're loving your time in How to God - time flies when you're having fun! 😅 Thanks again for your review, we appreciate it

reviews.review_title: My favourite VR game this year.
reviews.review_description: This year was a mixed bag for VR games I personally played. Happy to say this game is an awesome note to end the year on. Loving it so far and excited to spend more god time on the weekend.  :)

developer_response.body: Hi DamtheRam, so so so pleased to hear that!! We're glad to end your year on a high note. Thank you so much for your review, we appreciate it a lot 😊

reviews.review_description: It is not easy to decide on being good or evil. Good by itself is satisfying, but playing evil is so much fun! Finally a game where you can live out youre deeper desires in a harmless way! Although maybe not for youre (virtual) underlings ;)

developer_response.body: "Harmless" you say as all of your villagers are on fire 🤣 Both options offer different perspectives, so really glad to hear that you're having a good time! Thanks for your review 😊

reviews.review_title: Good VS Evil, which God are you?
reviews.review_description:
This game is amazing! Reminiscent, and possibly inspired through Black and White, this game let's you be a benevolent - all good, or devious - all evil, creator or unmaker of various upstanding townsfolk or plebs!
Well designed maps, excellent use of God powers, and constantly getting improved by the always active Development team. This game is a lot of fun, and can't wait for the additions coming up in the road maps! New maps, powers. 
Smite me down if you don't have a great time!

developer_response.body: Yay!! We put so much time and love into How to God, we're so happy to hear that it came across. We can't wait to show you all of the new things we're adding to the game. Fans like you make it fun and exciting! Thanks for your review 🙌

reviews.review_title: One of the best games out there
reviews.review_description: This game has everything creativity problem solving and more truly a great and fun game. I love it so much it has become one of my favorite games.

developer_response.body: Thanks TthAce! There's lots of fun surprises waiting for you as you continue. Hope you enjoy 😇

reviews.review_description: Loads of fun so far! Looking forward to exploring the different areas. And the little owl is so cute I can‘t 🥹

developer_response.body: The owl is sooooo cute, can't argue there. Thanks so much for your review, can't wait to see what other shenanigans you get in to!

reviews.review_description: I have been in the discord and even after all of the leaks nothing would of prepared me for how God the game is. I thought it would play more like desim but it is more story focused and I love that.

developer_response.body: Hi Jack - we appreciate that very much!! We love having fans like you in our Discord and super glad to hear that we exceeded your expectations 😊 Thanks so much for your review!

reviews.review_description:
I was hyped about this one and it did not disappoint.
Among all the things you can throw, throwing villagers is my favorite :)

developer_response.body: Next, try throwing bandits and playing target practice with fire balls!! Just kidding, Evil overcame me for that one. Thanks so much for your review, and so glad to hear you're having a good time! 🔥

reviews.review_description: so far seem to like it tutorial is well done

developer_response.body: Thank you very much, we appreciate your kind words 😇 Hope you enjoy the rest of the game as well!

reviews.review_description:
This reminds me of classic god games from the early 2000s such as black and white. 
If you want a fun experience and a relaxing time buy it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! 😊

reviews.review_description:
The art style is absolutely gorgeous. My little guy kicked a man and I couldn't be a prouder dad. <3
Very fun cozy game.

developer_response.body: Ahh, brings a tear to my eye! They grow up so fast 😭 Thank you so much for your review, we truly hope you enjoy as much creature time as you can get!!

reviews.review_description: The throwing. The throwing. Its so cool. Just WEEEEE

reviews.review_description: I loved the old B&W title and how to train your own creature and How to God is bringing it to VR in a very polished way. Congratz!

developer_response.body: High praise! We worked hard behind the scenes to make this launch the best it could be, so we're very happy to hear that it's been a success. Thank you very much for your review 🫶

reviews.review_description: Been looking for something like this for VR, glad to finally have this itch scratched

developer_response.body: Happy to oblige! Thanks for your review, hope you enjoy 😊

reviews.review_description: Good

developer_response.body: Yay! Happy to hear that you're enjoying your time in How to God 😄 Thank you so much for your review!

reviews.review_description: Can’t wait to play

developer_response.body: Oh wow a review from THE JonatanBailie8905?? We're so honored - can't wait for you to dig into the game. Thanks so much 🙌

reviews.review_description: Fun hehe

developer_response.body: Agreed 😄🙌

reviews.review_description: you feel like you're an actual god

developer_response.body: Hi NinjaKid! Couldn't have said it better ourselves 😉 Thanks a bunch for your review, we appreciate it

reviews.review_description: Pretty addictive

developer_response.body: We definitely agree- it's easy to lose a few hours 😅 thanks for you review! If there's anything we can do to improve your experience, please let us know.
